steps.assistant_text: Mirror of gui_func_000014EC (same body: return a1 - gl_func_00000000(a0, a2)). Boundary fix first: split-fragments.py separated this 10-insn wrapper from the 1048-insn dispatcher that follows at gui_func_0000161C. Per feedback_split_fragments_overswallow_internal_jr_ra.md, only the FIRST split was valid — recursive splitting would have over-split the dispatcher's internal jr ra exits.
